description: Order item 2 (partial): aggregate conversion-plan manifest for the numbered->packed expert conversion present in the installed runtime, plus a precise delimitation of what it does NOT cover for the GPTQ artifact. Source inspection + metadata only; no weights.

conversion_plan_present_in_transformers.version_drift_guard: verify_conversion_plan_present confirms these frozen entries exist in the installed conversion_mapping.py

gptq_coverage_gap.reason: the WeightConverter source_patterns target `.weight`; the GPTQ artifact stores `.qweight/.qzeros/.scales/.g_idx` per numbered expert, which these converters do not match
gptq_coverage_gap.implication: the transformers global conversion handles a STANDARD (bf16/fp16) numbered->packed merge but NOT the quantized tensors; the GPTQ route needs a separate stack: Optimum QuantLinear replacement (cannot apply to packed nn.Parameter experts) OR GPTQModel+Defuser (defuses the model to numbered experts to match the numbered quantized checkpoint)

remaining_runtime_audit.gptq_stack_required: freeze + install the GPTQ loader tuple (Optimum and/or GPTQModel+Defuser, pinned) to inspect the exact quantized conversion path and produce the per-quant-tensor conversion-plan manifest; this is a runtime-tuple freeze decision (a package install/pin), not yet taken
remaining_runtime_audit.then: synthetic strict-load fixture through the real pinned loader stack; Phase-0 conjunction; weights; authorized GPU transition; exact forward + VJP/JVP parity

privacy: aggregate-only; conversion-op labels + booleans, no tensor names/values, weights, caches, or local paths
